template: Fix '{object}' in table '{table}': Filter column values with proper syntax.
steps: Instead of using this pattern FILTER('Table','Table'[Column]="Value") for the filter parameters of a CALCULATE or CALCULATETABLE function, use one of these options: KEEPFILTERS('Table'[Column]="Value") or 'Table'[Column]="Value".

template: Fix '{object}' in table '{table}': Filter measure values by columns, not tables.
steps: Instead of using this pattern FILTER('Table',[Measure]>Value) for the filter parameters of a CALCULATE or CALCULATETABLE function, filter by a column expression or use KEEPFILTERS with an explicit column predicate.
